author: kpedro88
body:
#### PR description:

The culmination of substantial work primarily by the IISER Pune and Johns Hopkins University groups, with assistance from SIM and the tracker DPG.

Major developments:
* New definition of FastSim simplified tracker geometry and material introduced to correspond to Phase 2 upgrade
* New pixel resolution histograms from JHU at https://github.com/cms-data/FastSimulation-TrackingRecHitProducer/pull/5
* Phase 2 digitization sequences updated to work with FastSim
* Updated FastSim tracking iterations to correspond to Phase 2 sequences
* Workflows added for D110 (development baseline for past ~year) and D121 (current default)

Technical developments:
* Change handling of FastSim geometry sequences to adapt more easily to multiple Phase 2 geometries
* Add an Era "Util" to make temporary FastSim-specific workflow changes to Phase 2 Eras
* Simplify some old code in DIGI aliases

Still to come later:
* Realistic outer tracker resolutions
* Overall physics validation
* Move beyond tracking-only reconstruction in workflows

#### PR validation:

Ran new workflows 36434.0 and 36834.0 successfully.

Also ran Run 3 workflow 16434.0 to ensure previous sequences were not disrupted by these changes.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

N/A
title: Introduce Phase 2 FastSim (tracker) workflows
